content_security_policy.purpose: Allow Riposte settings to read sync status and start dispute sync jobs

permissions.purpose: Receive dispute webhook events so Riposte can start and update dispute workflows
Read the connected account business name shown in Riposte settings
Read dispute details, evidence deadlines, reasons, and outcomes
Submit approved evidence responses for disputes
Read disputed charge details including receipt, billing details, payment method checks, and refund state
Read payment context connected to disputed charges
Read payment method card fingerprint so Riposte can match disputed and prior card payments
Read Stripe customer identity and contact details linked to disputed payments
Read invoice and receipt context when a disputed payment came from a subscription or invoice
Upload evidence files that Stripe requires for dispute responses
Confirm uploaded evidence files and reference them in dispute response records
Read subscription plan, interval, and cancellation status to prove active service in SaaS dispute evidence
